items.title: Mike Gansey, asked if Labaron Philon Jr. being picked with the asset the Sixers acquired for Jared McCain for No. 22, says he was not here when the trade was made but "I hope [Philon is] good" and someone that people "like as much as Jared."
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Mike Gansey, asked if Labaron Philon Jr. being picked with the asset the Sixers acquired for Jared McCain for No. 22, says he was not here when the trade was made but "I hope [Philon is] good" and someone that people "like as much as Jared."

items.title: Labaron Philon Jr. is the pick. The Sixers have another guard, drafted with the pick that compelled them to part with Jared McCain at the trade deadline: www.phillyvoice.com/sixers-news-...
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Labaron Philon Jr. is the pick. The Sixers have another guard, drafted with the pick that compelled them to part with Jared McCain at the trade deadline: www.phillyvoice.com/sixers-news-...

media.title: Sixers select Labaron Philon Jr. with No. 22 overall pick in 2026 NBA Draft
media.description: New Sixers President of Basketball Operations Mike Gansey did not regard fit or need as he made his first draft pick as a lead decision-maker.

items.title: 76ers had the only pair of guards that both played 35+ minutes per game last season, the previous basketball president traded Jared McCain, and Philadelphia had to cut Cameron Payne and were left with the remains of Kyle Lowry as their only backup point guard
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
76ers had the only pair of guards that both played 35+ minutes per game last season, the previous basketball president traded Jared McCain, and Philadelphia had to cut Cameron Payne and were left with the remains of Kyle Lowry as their only backup point guard

Enter Labaron Philon Jr.

items.title: Hawks get a fine player on a good contract for free! Wiggins was Sixers’ primary target at trade deadline last season; there was hope the Jared McCain trade could have become a McCain-for-Wiggins deal but it did not come to fruition.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Hawks get a fine player on a good contract for free! Wiggins was Sixers’ primary target at trade deadline last season; there was hope the Jared McCain trade could have become a McCain-for-Wiggins deal but it did not come to fruition.
